description_long: This is a large, wooden storage crate with reinforced diagonal planks and visible wood grain texture. The crate features several warning signs, including yellow triangular caution symbols with exclamation marks, suggesting it may contain hazardous or valuable contents. Graffiti and painted arrows in black, red, and green are present on different sides, giving it an urban, weathered appearance. The top of the crate is flat and solid, suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, indicating the lid may be removable or simply set in place. The overall construction appears robust, making it suitable for use in industrial or outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, reinforced wooden crate with warning signs, graffiti, and a flat, stackable top. Its weathered look and caution markings suggest industrial or urban use.
description_view_0: This side shows a yellow warning sign with an exclamation mark and black graffiti on the lower left.
description_view_1: This side features a large red arrow and black graffiti, with a yellow warning sign visible on the top.
description_view_2: This side displays green graffiti and a yellow warning sign on the top, with no caution symbol on the front face.
description_view_3: This side has a large red arrow pointing downward and a yellow warning sign on the top, with no graffiti on the front face.
